arts.ttl: How Liverpool can win Premier League title TODAY with Arsenal task crystal clear
arts.sum: Liverpool can be crowned Premier League champions on Sunday following their game with Leicester - but they first need the result to go their way when Arsenal face Ipswich

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Liverpool Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Leicester, languishing in 19th position, will host the league-leading Liverpool at the King Power Stadium on April 20, 2025, at 16:30 GMT, in what promises to be a stern test for the home side. Leice...

arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool could be crowned Premier League champions with a win at Leicester City on Sunday. The Reds need a maximum of just six points from their remaining six games to win the title. Should Arsenal lose at Ipswich Town earlier in the day, Liverpool will win the Premier League with three points at Leicester. The […] The post Liverpool XI vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool turn attention towards Premier League star to replace Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Liverpool are going to be busy this transfer window with some of their players expected to leave the club. The biggest and the most talked about exit could be Trent Alexander-Arnold leaving the club for a move to join Real Madrid while striker Darwin Nunez is also likely to leave for a new adventure in […] The post Exclusive: Liverpool turn attention towards Premier League star to replace Alexander-Arnold appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Conor Coady outlines what Leicester City players must do ahead of 'big summer'
arts.sum: But with City’s fate almost certain, the job of the players is try to put the club in a more positive place ahead of the summer, knowing that they can “never be in this situation again”. Leicester City have a “big summer” on the horizon and it’s the responsibility of the players to get the club in the best shape for it.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne to Liverpool transfer link as 'most realistic' Premier League move emerges
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool transfer news and rumours as Kevin De Bruyne is leaving Manchester City at the end of this season, but not necessarily the Premier League, too

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano announces Dean Huijsen transfer amid Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been heavily linked with Huijsen, and it appears to be his dream move, but Los Blancos have yet to decide whether they will actually look to add a centre-back this summer, which has given Premier League clubs an advantage. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Dean Huijsen will likely stay in the Premier League this summer.

arts.ttl: 'I'm a former Liverpool goalkeeper and world's best Alisson is greatest we've ever had'
arts.sum: Liverpool are on the verge of the Premier League title and former goalkeeper David James insists the world's best goalkeeper is a major reason why

arts.ttl: Arne Slot right about Liverpool transfer plans but things could change quickly this summer
arts.sum: Arne Slot insists Liverpool need only one or two new players this summer - but such a claim could be put to the test with a number of Reds stars linked with possible exits

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Arne Slot clarifies Darwin Nunez rumours as replacement identified
arts.sum: Liverpool are closing in on the Premier League title and they could be confirmed as champions as soon as this weekend against Leicester while transfers have also been on the agenda
